mlb_player_props.method: Consensus-qualified player props using season, history, L10, and matchup signals as supporting inputs

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 8.91 K/9 over 17 appearances (17 starts)
New York Yankees lineup pitch-type K matchup neutral (2504 pitches): cutters 27% mix: 31% whiff, 20% K-ending PA; four-seamers 26% mix: 25% whiff, 27% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal cutters 27%, four-seamers 26%, sinkers 24% with 26.6% whiffs/swing
picks.matchup: New York Yankees @ Tampa Bay Rays
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 65.6%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 29.0%; Under history hit rate 83-102 (81.4%)
